title: Product Consultation
description: Clarity before code. We dig into your goals, users, and constraints, then shape a product direction and roadmap your team can actually execute — including where AI genuinely helps, and where it doesn't.

faq.q: What does a product consultation involve?
faq.a: It starts with a deep dive into your goals, users, current systems, and operational bottlenecks. From there we shape a practical product direction and a roadmap sequenced by impact — not by what's trendy.

faq.q: How long does an engagement typically take?
faq.a: Anywhere from a 2-week focused assessment to a 3-month roadmap-and-advisory engagement, depending on scale.

faq.q: Do we need custom AI or model training?
faq.a: Almost never. Most business value comes from simple workflow integration and off-the-shelf APIs. Part of my job is telling you when the boring solution is the right one.
